title: FX Brief — 23 Jul 2026
intro:
USD consolidates near neutral as markets weigh divergent central bank signals while JPY weakness persists above 163 amid intervention speculation.
💪 CURRENCY RANKING
EUR +0.36% — Outperforming on hawkish ECB rhetoric and resilient Eurozone data, strongest major today
CAD +0.23% — Oil-linked strength and softer USD dynamics supporting loonie gains across the board
AUD +0.09% — Modest gains despite China concerns, holding above 0.70 psychological level
USD +0.08% — Range-bound consolidation with mixed flows, near-term directional conviction lacking
GBP -0.07% — Underperforming on weak UK retail sales data, falling behind EUR momentum
JPY -0.18% — Persistent weakness beyond 163 raising intervention risk, BoJ policy inertia weighing
CHF -0.26% — Safe-haven outflows as risk sentiment stabilizes, underperforming European peers
NZD -0.42% — Weakest major on dairy price declines and dovish RBNZ expectations

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1421 +0.15% | LONG | S:1.1380 R:1.1480 — ECB hawkishness driving momentum, bullish channel intact
USDJPY 163.37 +0.11% | SHORT | S:164.20 R:162.50 — Stretched levels invite intervention, fade rallies
GBPUSD 1.3370 -0.07% | NEUTRAL | S:1.3320 R:1.3420 — UK data disappointment capping upside near resistance
AUDUSD 0.7002 +0.02% | LONG | S:0.6970 R:0.7050 — Holding key 0.70 support, positive divergence emerging
🔄 CROSS PAIRS
EURGBP 0.8540 +0.21% | LONG | S:0.8510 R:0.8580 — EUR outperformance accelerating, UK weakness supportive
CADJPY 116.09 +0.35% | LONG | S:115.50 R:117.00 — Commodity strength plus JPY weakness, dual tailwinds

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: EURGBP | 0.8540 | 0.8510 | 0.8590 | EUR momentum vs GBP weakness, clean breakout setup
LONG: EURUSD | 1.1420 | 1.1380 | 1.1490 | ECB hawks vs Fed pause narrative, trend continuation play
SHORT: USDJPY | 163.40 | 164.20 | 162.30 | Intervention risk elevated, mean reversion opportunity
SHORT: NZDJPY | 94.75 | 95.50 | 93.
